zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Heigham於1442年5月7日出生在英國素福爾可時，他的父親THOMAS HIGHAM IV23歲，母親Isabel Franceys Fraunceys20歲。他和Catherine Heigham Cotton至少有1個兒子。他去世於1520年4月9日享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Heigham于1442年5月7日出生在英国素福爾可时，他的父亲THOMAS HIGHAM IV23岁，母亲Isabel Franceys Fraunceys20岁。他和Catherine Heigham Cotton至少有1个儿子。他去世于1520年4月9日享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Heigham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Higham (Lancashire, Yorkshire, Derbyshire, Leicestershire, Northamptonshire, Bedfordshire, Warwickshire, Essex, and Kent) or from Heigham in Norfolk. Most of the placenames derive from Old English hēah ‘high’ + hām ‘village, homestead’, though the Norfolk placename may come from Old English hecg ‘hedge’ or hecc ‘hatch, gate’ + hām.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Heigham was born on 7 May 1442, in Suffolk, England, his father, THOMAS HIGHAM IV, was 23 and his mother, Isabel Franceys Fraunceys, was 20. He had at least 1 son with Catherine Heigham Cotton. He died on 9 April 1520, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Heigham est né le 7 mai 1442, à Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, THOMAS HIGHAM IV, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Isabel Franceys Fraunceys, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Catherine Heigham Cotton. Il est décédé le 9 avril 1520, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Heigham am 7. Mai 1442 in Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater THOMAS HIGHAM IV 23 und seine Mutter Isabel Franceys Fraunceys 20. Er hatte mit Catherine Heigham Cotton mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 9. April 1520 im Alter von 77 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Heigham è nato il il 7 maggio 1442 nel Suffolk, England, il suo padre, THOMAS HIGHAM IV, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Franceys Fraunceys, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Catherine Heigham Cotton. Morì il 9 aprile 1520, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Heighamが1442年5月7日にイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父THOMAS HIGHAM IVは23歳，母Isabel Franceys Fraunceysは20歳であった。彼はCatherine Heigham Cottonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1520年4月9日に77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Heigham(이)가 1442년 5월 7일 영국 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 THOMAS HIGHAM IV(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Franceys Fraunceys(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Catherine Heigham Cotton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1520년 4월 9일 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.7 May 1442–9 April 1520: 7 de maio de 1442–9 de abril de 1520
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Heigham nasceu em 7 de maio de 1442, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, THOMAS HIGHAM IV, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Franceys Fraunceys, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Catherine Heigham Cotton. Ele faleceu em 9 de abril de 1520, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Heigham родился 7 мая 1442 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени THOMAS HIGHAM IV было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Franceys Fraunceys, 20. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Catherine Heigham Cotton. Он умер 9 апреля 1520 г. в возрасте 77 лет.

es.7 May 1442–9 April 1520: 7 de mayo de 1442–9 de abril de 1520
